summary: The video captures an urban street intersection with multiple vehicles and pedestrians. A black sedan is stopped at a red light facing the crosswalk, while a dark SUV drives across the intersection from right to left. Pedestrians are seen crossing the street at the crosswalk, and other cars are present in the background. Traffic signs and buildings flank the sides of the road.

events_timeline.event: A black sedan is halted at a red traffic light, awaiting the signal to turn green.
A dark SUV traverses the intersection from right to left.
Pedestrians are actively crossing the street at the designated crosswalk.

uncertainties: Exact positions and identities of additional vehicles beyond those shown.

risk_assessment.why: There are no apparent collisions, reckless behaviors, or hazardous interactions among the visible actors.
